module.name: CROWDAQ
module.author: CROWDAQ
module.description: Renders a live CROWDAQ sports-excitement feed on a Xibo display (score, excitement meter, last notable moment) over Server-Sent Events.

property.title: CROWDAQ API base URL
property.helpText: Base URL of the CROWDAQ backend (e.g. https://crowdaq.bar-pc.tailnet). Appended with /events/<eventId>/stream at runtime. Leave blank to fall back to window.crowdaqBackendBase (set by the bar-PC bootstrap). When both are empty the widget shows a "Configure apiBaseUrl" placeholder. Multi-bar targeting: a value of the form display:<field> (e.g. display:displayName) is resolved at render time against the player's xiboIC.info() response — see docs/TARGETING.md for the supported fields.

test.message: apiBaseUrl must be empty, an https:// URL, or a display:<field> placeholder.

property.title: Event ID
property.helpText: CROWDAQ event / match identifier (e.g. worldcup-2026-semi-br-ar). If left blank the backend resolves the best available live event for this display. Multi-bar targeting: a value of the form display:<field> (e.g. display:displayName) is resolved at render time against the player's xiboIC.info() response so a single layout can serve many bars — see docs/TARGETING.md.

test.message: eventId must be empty, a literal id, or a display:<field> placeholder.

property.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
property.helpText: Used by the stale detector: if no SSE event (including heartbeat) arrives within 2 * this value, the widget fades to a "stale" pill. Minimum 5.

test.message: Refresh interval must be at least 5 seconds.

property.title: Show team logos
property.helpText: Show team crest images when the feed supplies them. When a logo_url fails to load, the widget falls back to the team abbreviation.

property.title: Show last notable moment
property.helpText: Show the most recent notable moment text (goal, red card, VAR check, etc.) below the score line.

property.title: Moment text length (chars)
property.helpText: Maximum number of characters to render from the last-moment text. Longer strings are truncated with a trailing ellipsis.

test.message: Moment length must be a positive number.

stencil.twig:
Home
0 – 0
Away
0.0 •
Waiting for CROWDAQ feed…
connecting
stale
